iteration_0_baseline.notes: Original skill (identical to verbose). weather-compare lost 10 points on presentation-quality (LLM judge). Model used format=1 (temp only), failed on 'New York' URL (space not encoded), fell back to Open-Meteo for NY.

iteration_1.notes: Added explicit URL encoding rules, format=j1 instructions, and example saving to /tmp files. Model wrote comparison to a file instead of response text, losing weather-metrics and per-city-completeness scores.

iteration_2.notes: Added rule: NEVER write results to files, ALWAYS present in response text. Removed /tmp file examples. Both tasks perfect.

iteration_3_confirmation.notes: Model reverted to format=1 and format=4 instead of j1, missing humidity. Strengthened constraints: explicit NEVER list for wrong formats, field-to-meaning table.

iteration_4_final.notes: Both tasks perfect. Confirmed with second consecutive run also scoring 100/100.

changes_made: Added explicit NEVER list for wrong format parameters (format=1, format=3, format=4) — MUST use format=j1
Added URL encoding rules: spaces must be '+', explicitly listed WRONG alternatives (%20, raw space)
Added rule: ALWAYS present data in response text, NEVER write to files
Added JSON field-to-meaning table for current_condition[0] fields
Added step-by-step task procedures for comparison and travel tasks
Added example comparison table template with all 4 required columns
Removed generic 'When to Use / When NOT to Use' sections to reduce noise
Removed PNG, airport code, and weekend forecast examples irrelevant to tasks
